from fastapi import FastAPI, Request
import openai
import json
import sqlite3
from datetime import datetime
from utils.sheets import append_to_sheet
from utils.tiktok import export_to_tiktok_csv

openai.api_key = "YOUR_OPENAI_API_KEY"

app = FastAPI()

DB = "data.db"

def init_db():
    conn = sqlite3.connect(DB)
    c = conn.cursor()
    c.execute("""
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS leads (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        user_id TEXT,
        name TEXT,
        phone TEXT,
        interest TEXT,
        status TEXT,
        created_at TEXT
    )
    """)
    conn.commit()
    conn.close()

init_db()

def extract_profile(message: str):
    prompt = f"""
    Extract customer info from message.
    Return JSON:
    name, phone, interest

    Message: {message}
    """

    res = openai.ChatCompletion.create(
        model="gpt-4o-mini",
        messages=[{"role": "user", "content": prompt}]
    )

    try:
        data = json.loads(res.choices[0].message.content)
    except:
        data = {"name": "", "phone": "", "interest": message}

    return data

def ai_reply(message: str):
    prompt = f"""
    You are a sales AI. Close the deal politely.
    Message: {message}
    """

    res = openai.ChatCompletion.create(
        model="gpt-4o-mini",
        messages=[{"role": "user", "content": prompt}]
    )

    return res.choices[0].message.content

def save_lead(user_id, profile):
    conn = sqlite3.connect(DB)
    c = conn.cursor()

    c.execute("""
    INSERT INTO leads (user_id, name, phone, interest, status, created_at)
    VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
    """, (
        user_id,
        profile.get("name"),
        profile.get("phone"),
        profile.get("interest"),
        "new",
        datetime.now().isoformat()
    ))

    conn.commit()
    conn.close()

@app.post("/webhook")
async def webhook(request: Request):
    body = await request.json()

    # Simplified LINE event parsing
    event = body["events"][0]
    user_id = event["source"]["userId"]
    message = event["message"]["text"]

    profile = extract_profile(message)
    save_lead(user_id, profile)

    reply = ai_reply(message)

    # Save to Google Sheets
    append_to_sheet([
        user_id,
        profile.get("name"),
        profile.get("phone"),
        profile.get("interest"),
        "new"
    ])

    return {"reply": reply}

from fastapi import FastAPI, Request
import sqlite3
import re
from datetime import datetime
from utils.sheets import append_to_sheet

app = FastAPI()
DB = "data.db"

def init_db():
    conn = sqlite3.connect(DB)
    c = conn.cursor()
    c.execute("""
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS leads (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        user_id TEXT,
        name TEXT,
        phone TEXT,
        interest TEXT,
        status TEXT,
        created_at TEXT
    )
    """)
    conn.commit()
    conn.close()

init_db()

def extract_phone(text: str):
    match = re.search(r'(0\d{8,9})', text)
    return match.group(1) if match else ""

def extract_name(text: str):
    # simple heuristic
    if "ชื่อ" in text:
        return text.split("ชื่อ")[-1].strip()
    return ""

def detect_intent(text: str):
    text = text.lower()
    if "ราคา" in text:
        return "price"
    if "ซื้อ" in text or "เอา" in text:
        return "buy"
    if extract_phone(text):
        return "lead"
    return "chat"

def generate_reply(intent: str):
    if intent == "price":
        return "สินค้าราคา 299 บาท สนใจสั่งซื้อพิมพ์ 'ซื้อ' ได้เลยครับ"
    if intent == "buy":
        return "รบกวนแจ้ง ชื่อ + เบอร์โทร เพื่อยืนยันออเดอร์ครับ"
    if intent == "lead":
        return "ขอบคุณครับ เดี๋ยวแอดมินติดต่อกลับเพื่อปิดการขาย 🙏"
    return "สอบถามเพิ่มเติมได้ครับ 😊"

def save_lead(user_id, name, phone, interest):
    conn = sqlite3.connect(DB)
    c = conn.cursor()

    c.execute("""
    INSERT INTO leads (user_id, name, phone, interest, status, created_at)
    VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
    """, (
        user_id,
        name,
        phone,
        interest,
        "new",
        datetime.now().isoformat()
    ))

    conn.commit()
    conn.close()

@app.post("/webhook")
async def webhook(request: Request):
    body = await request.json()

    event = body["events"][0]
    user_id = event["source"]["userId"]
    message = event["message"]["text"]

    intent = detect_intent(message)
    name = extract_name(message)
    phone = extract_phone(message)

    if phone:
        save_lead(user_id, name, phone, message)

        append_to_sheet([
            user_id,
            name,
            phone,
            message,
            "new"
        ])

    reply = generate_reply(intent)

    return {"reply": reply}

from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Depends, HTTPException
from fastapi.responses import FileResponse
from fastapi.security import HTTPBearer, HTTPAuthorizationCredentials
import sqlite3, requests, re, csv, threading, time
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from jose import jwt
from passlib.context import CryptContext
from utils.sheets import append_to_sheet

app = FastAPI()

DB = "data.db"
LINE_TOKEN = "YOUR_LINE_TOKEN"
SECRET = "SECRET_KEY"

security = HTTPBearer()
pwd_context = CryptContext(schemes=["bcrypt"])

USERS = {
    "admin": {"password": pwd_context.hash("1234"), "role": "admin"},
    "staff": {"password": pwd_context.hash("1234"), "role": "staff"},
}

# ---------- AUTH ----------
def create_token(username, role):
    return jwt.encode({"sub": username, "role": role}, SECRET, algorithm="HS256")

def verify_token(creds: HTTPAuthorizationCredentials = Depends(security)):
    try:
        return jwt.decode(creds.credentials, SECRET, algorithms=["HS256"])
    except:
        raise HTTPException(401, "Unauthorized")

def require_role(role):
    def wrapper(user=Depends(verify_token)):
        if user["role"] != role:
            raise HTTPException(403, "Forbidden")
        return user
    return wrapper

@app.post("/login")
def login(data: dict):
    user = USERS.get(data["username"])
    if user and pwd_context.verify(data["password"], user["password"]):
        return {"token": create_token(data["username"], user["role"])}
    raise HTTPException(401, "Invalid login")

# ---------- DB INIT ----------
def init_db():
    conn = sqlite3.connect(DB)
    c = conn.cursor()

    c.execute("""CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS leads (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        user_id TEXT UNIQUE,
        name TEXT,
        phone TEXT,
        interest TEXT,
        score INTEGER,
        status TEXT,
        price INTEGER,
        last_contact TEXT,
        created_at TEXT
    )""")

    c.execute("""CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS templates (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        name TEXT,
        message TEXT
    )""")

    c.execute("""CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS campaigns (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        name TEXT,
        message TEXT,
        sent_count INTEGER,
        reply_count INTEGER,
        created_at TEXT
    )""")

    conn.commit()
    conn.close()

init_db()

# ---------- AI ----------
def ai_reply(msg):
    res = requests.post("http://localhost:11434/api/generate", json={
        "model": "llama3",
        "prompt": f"Close sale:\n{msg}",
        "stream": False
    })
    return res.json()["response"]

# ---------- LINE ----------
def line_reply(token, text):
    requests.post("https://api.line.me/v2/bot/message/reply",
                  headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {LINE_TOKEN}"},
                  json={"replyToken": token,
                        "messages": [{"type": "text", "text": text}]})

def line_push(user_id, text):
    requests.post("https://api.line.me/v2/bot/message/push",
                  headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {LINE_TOKEN}"},
                  json={"to": user_id,
                        "messages": [{"type": "text", "text": text}]})

# ---------- LOGIC ----------
def extract_phone(t): return re.search(r'(0\d{8,9})', t).group(1) if re.search(r'(0\d{8,9})', t) else ""
def extract_name(t): return t.split("ชื่อ")[-1].strip() if "ชื่อ" in t else ""

def score(t, phone):
    s = 0
    if "ราคา" in t: s += 1
    if "ซื้อ" in t: s += 3
    if phone: s += 5
    return s

def status(t, s):
    if "โอนแล้ว" in t or "สั่งแล้ว" in t: return "closed"
    if s >= 7: return "hot"
    if s >= 4: return "warm"
    return "cold"

# ---------- UPSERT ----------
def upsert(user_id, name, phone, msg):
    s = score(msg, phone)
    st = status(msg, s)
    price = 299 if st == "closed" else 0

    conn = sqlite3.connect(DB)
    c = conn.cursor()

    now = datetime.now().isoformat()

    c.execute("""
    INSERT INTO leads (user_id,name,phone,interest,score,status,price,last_contact,created_at)
    VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)
    ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO UPDATE SET
    name=excluded.name,
    phone=excluded.phone,
    interest=excluded.interest,
    score=excluded.score,
    status=excluded.status,
    price=excluded.price,
    last_contact=excluded.last_contact
    """, (user_id, name, phone, msg, s, st, price, now, now))

    conn.commit()
    conn.close()

    append_to_sheet([user_id, name, phone, msg, s, st])

# ---------- WEBHOOK ----------
@app.post("/webhook")
async def webhook(req: Request):
    body = await req.json()
    e = body["events"][0]

    user = e["source"]["userId"]
    token = e["replyToken"]
    msg = e["message"]["text"]

    phone = extract_phone(msg)
    name = extract_name(msg)

    if phone:
        upsert(user, name, phone, msg)

    track_reply()

    line_reply(token, ai_reply(msg))
    return {"ok": True}

# ---------- FOLLOW-UP ----------
def follow():
    while True:
        conn = sqlite3.connect(DB)
        c = conn.cursor()

        c.execute("SELECT id,user_id,last_contact FROM leads WHERE status!='closed'")
        for i, u, lc in c.fetchall():
            if datetime.now() - datetime.fromisoformat(lc) > timedelta(minutes=10):
                line_push(u, "โปรโมชันวันนี้ 🔥")
                c.execute("UPDATE leads SET last_contact=? WHERE id=?",
                          (datetime.now().isoformat(), i))

        conn.commit()
        conn.close()
        time.sleep(60)

threading.Thread(target=follow, daemon=True).start()

# ---------- APIs ----------
@app.get("/api/leads")
def leads(user=Depends(verify_token)):
    conn = sqlite3.connect(DB)
    c = conn.cursor()
    c.execute("SELECT id,name,phone,interest,score,status FROM leads")
    r = c.fetchall()
    conn.close()
    return [{"id": x[0], "name": x[1], "phone": x[2], "interest": x[3], "score": x[4], "status": x[5]} for x in r]

@app.patch("/api/leads/{id}")
def update(id: int, d: dict, user=Depends(verify_token)):
    conn = sqlite3.connect(DB)
    c = conn.cursor()
    c.execute("UPDATE leads SET status=? WHERE id=?", (d["status"], id))
    conn.commit()
    conn.close()
    return {"ok": True}

@app.post("/api/broadcast")
def broadcast(d: dict, user=Depends(require_role("admin"))):
    conn = sqlite3.connect(DB)
    c = conn.cursor()

    c.execute("INSERT INTO campaigns (name,message,sent_count,reply_count,created_at) VALUES (?,?,0,0,?)",
              (d.get("name", "campaign"), d["message"], datetime.now().isoformat()))
    cid = c.lastrowid

    c.execute("SELECT user_id FROM leads")
    users = c.fetchall()

    for (u,) in users:
        line_push(u, d["message"])

    c.execute("UPDATE campaigns SET sent_count=? WHERE id=?", (len(users), cid))

    conn.commit()
    conn.close()

    return {"sent": len(users)}

def track_reply():
    conn = sqlite3.connect(DB)
    c = conn.cursor()
    c.execute("UPDATE campaigns SET reply_count = reply_count + 1 WHERE id=(SELECT id FROM campaigns ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1)")
    conn.commit()
    conn.close()

from sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import insert
from app.models import Lead

def upsert_lead(user_id, name, phone, msg, score, status, price):
    db = SessionLocal()

    stmt = insert(Lead).values(
        user_id=user_id,
        name=name,
        phone=phone,
        interest=msg,
        score=score,
        status=status,
        price=price,
    )

    stmt = stmt.on_conflict_do_update(
        index_elements=["user_id"],
        set_={
            "name": name,
            "phone": phone,
            "interest": msg,
            "score": score,
            "status": status,
            "price": price,
        }
    )

    db.execute(stmt)
    db.commit()
    db.close()

# ---------- LOGIC ----------
def extract_phone(t):
    m = re.search(r'(0\d{8,9})', t)
    return m.group(1) if m else ""

def extract_name(t):
    return t.split("ชื่อ")[-1].strip() if "ชื่อ" in t else ""

def score(t, phone):
    s = 0
    if "ราคา" in t: s += 1
    if "ซื้อ" in t: s += 3
    if phone: s += 5
    return s

def status(t, s):
    if "โอนแล้ว" in t or "สั่งแล้ว" in t:
        return "closed"
    if s >= 7:
        return "hot"
    if s >= 4:
        return "warm"
    return "cold"

# ---------- UPSERT ----------
def upsert(user_id, name, phone, msg):
    db: Session = SessionLocal()

    s = score(msg, phone)
    st = status(msg, s)
    price = 299 if st == "closed" else 0

    stmt = insert(Lead).values(
        user_id=user_id,
        name=name,
        phone=phone,
        interest=msg,
        score=s,
        status=st,
        price=price,
        last_contact=datetime.now().isoformat(),
        created_at=datetime.now().isoformat()
    )

    stmt = stmt.on_conflict_do_update(
        index_elements=["user_id"],
        set_=dict(
            name=name,
            phone=phone,
            interest=msg,
            score=s,
            status=st,
            price=price,
            last_contact=datetime.now().isoformat()
        )
    )

    db.execute(stmt)
    db.commit()
    db.close()

    append_to_sheet([user_id, name, phone, msg, s, st])

import time
import redis
import os

r = redis.Redis.from_url(os.getenv("REDIS_URL", "redis://localhost:6379"))

LIMIT = 20  # msgs
WINDOW = 60  # seconds

def allow(user_id: str):
    key = f"rate:{user_id}"

    current = r.get(key)

    if current and int(current) >= LIMIT:
        return False

    pipe = r.pipeline()
    pipe.incr(key, 1)
    pipe.expire(key, WINDOW)
    pipe.execute()

    return True
